calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Mutual Transportation Group.

Dept. 505; Judge Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:23 am and concluding at 9:31 am

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc. is represented by Soheila Somrani, Esq.
Defendant Mutual Transportation Group not appearing.
Proof of service on file.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., and against Defendant Mutual Transportation Group.

Plaintiff Creditors Adjustment Bureau Inc., is awarded judgment against Defendant Mutual Transportation Group as follows:

Damages/Principal: $40,470.00
Pre-Judgment Interest $3,970.05
Costs: $524.75
Attorney Fees: $2,825.00
Total Judgment: $47,789.80

Proposed Judgment was submitted and signed by the Court. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Dec-05-2025 Continued To Dec-31-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
